
```{r}
#seurat_9p is the seurat object of an internal UC atlas study that has not been published yet. 

library(ggpubr)
#merge all the Crypt Top Fib together
seurat_9p$cell_type_short_2 <- ifelse(seurat_9p$cell_type_short %in% c("NRG1+ Crypt Top Fib", "VSTM2A+ Crypt Top Fib"),
                                      "Crypt Top Fib", seurat_9p$cell_type_short)
Idents(seurat_9p) <- "cell_type_short"
#do a customized dotplot
df <- FetchData(seurat_9p, vars = c("ANGIOGENESIS_NR_up_all2", "cell_type_short_2", "condition"))

#caculate the percentage
dot_data <- df %>%
  filter(cell_type_short_2 %in% c("Activ Fib", "ADAMDEC1+ Fib", "CXCL5+ Activ Fib", "OGN+RSPO3+ Fib", "Crypt Top Fib",
                                "CD36+ Peri", "Inf Mo-Mac", "Neutrophil", "Endothelial")) %>%
  group_by(cell_type_short_2, condition) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_exp = mean(ANGIOGENESIS_NR_up_all2),
    pct_exp = 100 * sum(ANGIOGENESIS_NR_up_all2 > 0) / n()
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

dot_data$condition <- factor(dot_data$condition, levels = c("Inflamed", "Non-inflamed", "Healthy"))

p <- ggplot(dot_data, aes(x = cell_type_short_2, y = condition)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = pct_exp, color = avg_exp)) +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "lightgrey", high = "red") +
  scale_size(range = c(1, 10)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "ANGIOGENESIS Module Score",
    x = "Cell Type",
    y = "Condition",
    size = "% expressing",
    color = "Average expression"
  ) + theme_classic() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
```
